raw_output: {"predictions":[{"common_name":"Canada Goose","scientific_name":"Branta canadensis","rank_hint":"species","confidence":0.98,"field_marks":"Black head and neck with white chinstrap, brownish-gray body, large size, open bill showing pinkish interior"},{"common_name":"Cackling Goose","scientific_name":"Branta hutchinsii","rank_hint":"species","confidence":0.15,"field_marks":"Smaller than Canada Goose, similar black head/white chinstrap but shorter neck and smaller bill; possible confusion in juveniles or distant views"},{"common_name":"Brant","scientific_name":"Branta bernicla","rank_hint":"species","confidence":0.05,"field_marks":"Darker plumage, lacks prominent white chinstrap, smaller, more coastal; unlikely given field marks"},{"common_name":"Black Brant","scientific_name":"Branta bernicla nigricans","rank_hint":"subspecies","confidence":0.02,"field_marks":"Subspecies of Brant; even darker, no white chinstrap; inconsistent with image"},{"common_name":"Goose (genus Branta)","scientific_name":"Branta spp.","rank_hint":"genus","confidence":0.99,"field_marks":"Black head and neck, white cheek patch, large waterfowl; diagnostic for genus"}],"abstain":false,"abstain_reason":null,"overall_confidence":0.98}
